display_text: Sven Aghanim's Scepter: Storm Hammer counters invulnerable enemies and can be alt-cast for an additional damage boost, making it a versatile initiation tool that bypasses evasion or immunity effects while offering mobility.
search_text: Sven Aghanim Scepter anti-invulnerability evasion immunity initiation mobility

display_text: Sven Aghanim's Shard: Warcry becomes undispellable and passively provides armor, turning Sven into a durable aura carrier who counters physical damage dealers and ensures team survivability in prolonged fights.
search_text: Sven Aghanim Shard undispellable physical damage armor aura team survivability
